releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Review recommendation update.

Changes:
- Added GitHub Actions release workflow.
- Release assets are now built by GitHub Actions.
- Added artifact attestations for release assets.
- Changed CSV export to download a CSV file instead of writing to the system clipboard.
- Bumped plugin version to 1.0.2.

Release assets:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
releases.name: Spreadsheet Table 1.0.2

releases.author: q7jxb7yxdk-star
releases.description:
Review feedback update.

Changes:
- Updated Obsidian API usage for declared minAppVersion compatibility.
- Improved popout window compatibility.
- Removed unsupported package dependency.
- Cleaned up settings and command labels for Community Plugins review.
- Fixed TypeScript review warnings.
releases.name: Spreadsheet Table 1.0.1

releases.author: q7jxb7yxdk-star
releases.description:
Initial release of Spreadsheet Table.

Features:
- Spreadsheet-style editing for Markdown tables.
- Formula calculation with A1 references, ranges, SUM, AVERAGE, CONVERT, DATE, TODAY, and DAYS.
- Formula result rendering in Live Preview and Reading Mode.
- Optional column letters and row numbers in Live Preview.
- Right sidebar toolbar and Command Palette actions.
- CSV export.
releases.name: Spreadsheet Table 1.0.0
